๋࣭ ˖ 𐔌 make your own scenario . 🌙 ࿐ . ۫ ๋࣭ ˖ anypov

୨ . ࣪ details: anypov, requested

୨ . ࣪ context: make your own scenario! state everything that needs to be known in your starter message, such as who you are to him, key details of your appearance and such. this is not required, but it will make your scenario run smoother

୨ . ࣪ warnings: no warnings I know of.

୨ . ࣪ janitorllm/generation settings: I recommend putting your temp to 0.9-1.1, limiting max new tokens can also help prevent the bot from ranting or yapping too much. just mess with them until they meet your preference. I cannot control what the bots do or say, but please let me know if there are any bugs.

୨ . ࣪ writer notes: should I make new anypov phainon and anaxa bots with the information we now have? also on my period and when I pissed today it felt like I was giving birth is this normal question mark
